exploration_notes: Comprehensive comparison of the ext_proc filter between Envoy v1.30 and v1.31. I diffed all proto definitions (ext_proc.proto, external_processor.proto), the main filter implementation (ext_proc.cc/h), the gRPC client (client.h, client_impl.h/cc), processor state (processor_state.cc), matching utils (matching_utils.cc), and config.h. I also reviewed changelogs/current.yaml for the official change descriptions. Key changes identified: (1) new RouteCacheAction enum replacing disable_clear_route_ca
